name: worktree-warden
description: Enforces worktree-first editing via a PreToolUse gate that blocks main-checkout edits (with a deliberate, time-boxed, per-repo/global opt-out exception), blocks destruction of any dirty or un-landed worktree/branch (raw git worktree remove, rm -rf, git branch -D, ExitWorktree remove), serializes concurrent merges/main-edits and /bumpall and blocks two separate sessions from editing one shared worktree via a cooperative per-worktree advisory lock (stale-lease reclaim + one-step force-unlock), captures uncommitted WIP to recoverable bundles and detects externally-removed worktrees across sessions, audits every land/teardown/undo, surfaces a repo's git worktrees and active/stale locks at session start (configurable), and lands chosen ones into the default branch by deterministic rebase + fast-forward with confidence-gated conflict handling and exact-state rollback. Repo-scoped — never looks cross-repo.
